profileAverage.desc: {{period}} · three metrics vs your similar-user cohort

maxWeight.title: Max weight (PR)
maxWeight.hint: Heaviest weight lifted on this machine

sessionVolume.title: Volume per session
sessionVolume.hint: Average total weight per workout (all sets)

growth.title: Volume growth rate
growth.hint: First vs last log change in {{period}}

consistency.above: Increasing workout frequency can accelerate growth further.
consistency.near: Workout frequency is low. Aim for 2–3 logged sessions per week.
consistency.below: Long gaps between sessions are slowing progress. Restart with a shorter cycle.

intensity.above: Volume is steady but max weight has plateaued. Try the next target load.
intensity.near: Weight has stalled. Increase load slightly on each set.
intensity.below: It is time to raise intensity with small load increases.

volume.above: Growth is strong. Balance load and set count carefully.
volume.near: You are growing at an average pace. Try raising total volume a bit.
volume.below: Growth is below cohort average. Increase sets or load gradually.

recovery.above: Recent volume dropped. Resume after recovery.
recovery.near: Volume decreased recently. Restart within a comfortable range.
recovery.below: Signs of fatigue. Use a lighter recovery week.

maintain.above: You are outpacing similar users. Keep the current pace.
maintain.near: You are ahead of average. Prefer small jumps over big leaps.
maintain.below: Growth is healthy. Focus on the next target weight.

tips.consistency: Logging on the same weekdays makes trends easier to read.
tips.intensity: Train around RPE 7–8 instead of failure every set for sustainable gains.
tips.volume: Adding 2.5 kg per set while keeping set count is a safe progression.
tips.recovery: Prioritize sleep and protein; focus on form over PRs this week.
tips.maintain: Try a 2.5–5 kg increase every 2–3 weeks for progressive overload.
tips.plateau: If weight stalls for 2+ weeks, add one set or shorten rest periods.
tips.lowFrequency: Recent logs are sparse. Target at least twice per week.
tips.abovePeer: You are growing faster than similar users. Watch for overtraining.
tips.belowPeer: To match the cohort average, try raising total volume by 10–15%.

nextTarget.title: Next workout target weight
nextTarget.desc: Suggested from recent logs and progressive overload

pwa.installHint: Add to your home screen for faster access at the gym.
pwa.iosInstallHint: Tap Share in Safari, then choose "Add to Home Screen".
pwa.chromeInstallHint: Use the install icon in the address bar or Menu (⋮) → "Install MachineFit".
pwa.chromeMobileInstallHint: Open Chrome Menu (⋮) → "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
